name: Oncosil Medical Ltd
analysis: OSL has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 69% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.6400, stop A$0.4306, target A$0.7100 (0.33:1) — then trail it.
